claims.summary: String connection labels are insufficient without numeric temporal evidence.
claims.disposition: verify inter-arrival, first-valid lag, jitter class, cadence score, and timing basis fields

claims.summary: Field and hearing can conflict and should not be collapsed into one label.
claims.disposition: verify the explicit field-versus-hearing evidence and stale/current classifications

claims.summary: Legacy and typed coherence need aligned, divergent, and malformed probes.
claims.disposition: verify existing hybrid coherence tests and route a bounded high-jitter observation

claims.summary: Pressure-responsive cadence or a live spectral-drag field would change consumed interpretation.
claims.disposition: preserve an exact Tier 5 approval and compatibility path
